setColumnRemarks.remarks: Persisted as an instant, resolved from the administrator-authored LocalDate using the application-level conluz.time.zone.id at the moment of activation (see ZoneResolver). A persisted instant does not migrate: when the zone moves to community level, the backfill must seed every existing community with the application-level value in force at that moment, or older coefficients will keep the old instant while newer ones use the new one and the timeline becomes internally inconsistent by one hour, silently.
